extraction_notes: Wikipedia source provided game metadata (composer: Nenad Vugrinec, year: 1993, platform: DOS/PC) but contained no documentation of music tempos, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, modes, melodic characteristics, track names, area assignments, or SFX characteristics. Data Tier T2 designation indicates qualitative/empirical data expected, but no such audio analysis was present in the available source material.
